simulation_meaning: A war needs food, claims, fear, profit, revenge, religion or survival.
Every magical act consumes body, time, catalysts, training, legitimacy or political trust.
Orcs, elves and dwarves must have internal class divisions, regional cultures, allies, traitors, rulers, peasants and contradictions.

pillar: No clean good and evil factions.
simulation_meaning: Every side should have reasons, crimes, debts and fears.

pillar: No world that waits for the player.
simulation_meaning: The observer watches history unfold through chronicles, ledgers, battle reports, biographies, maps and conflicting historians.
Important names need local, common, imperial, religious, enemy and scholar layers.
